name: opencode-sol-orchestrator
description: Managed child-worker orchestration tools and optional agent defaults for OpenCode.
author: reyj94

scripts.test: node --test server.test.js orchestration-state.test.js orchestration-store.test.js test/compaction-snapshot.test.js && bun test tui.test.tsx
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check compaction-snapshot.js && node --check orchestration-state.js && node --check orchestration-store.js && node --check agents.js && node --check server.test.js && node --check orchestration-state.test.js && node --check orchestration-store.test.js && node --check test/compaction-snapshot.test.js && tsc --project tsconfig.json
